name: WhiteFiber, Inc.
summary: PART I Our Business We believe we are a leading provider of artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure solutions. We own high-performance computing (HPC) data centers and provide cloud-based HPC graphics processing units (GPU) services, which we term cloud services, for customers such as AI application and machine learning (ML) developers (the HPC Business). Our Tier-3 data centers provide hosting and colocation services. Our cloud services support generative AI workstreams, especially training...
